title: ALETHEIA pipeline inputs (pre-execution contract)
description: Minimal structured inputs that must be fixed before /run-pipeline for deterministic orchestration. Runtime state (step status, loop counters) lives in pipeline-state.json separately.

schema_version.description: Version of this contract. Bump when breaking changes are made to required fields.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier; determines projects/<slug>/ and project_dir in pipeline-state.json.

display_title.description: Human-facing paper title. Optional; if omitted, orchestrator may derive from slug or research.topic.

topic.description: Canonical research question for Pass 1 (/research-landscape) and scope for literature steps. Stored as research_topic in pipeline-state.json.

domain_hints.description: Optional keywords or subfield names to disambiguate search queries (steps 1–2, 4, 8, 23–24).

target_venue.description: Optional submission target (e.g. neurips, iclr, acl). Informs page limits, anonymization, and LaTeX class in /story, /produce-manuscript, /compile-manuscript.

skip_online.description: When true, aligns with /run-pipeline --skip-online for steps marked needs_online in run-pipeline.md.

seeds_per_condition.description: Default seeds per experimental condition; consumed by /design-experiments and /plan-compute unless overridden in docs/experiment-plan.md.

gpus_per_job.description: Default GPUs per SLURM job; must align with rules/compute-budget.md for steps 17–18.
